violations.text: The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-300 ppm. Establishment is to have the sanitizer dispenser serviced. Quaternary ammonium was corrected to 200 ppm at the time of inspection. Per PIC, sanitizer dispenser will be serviced today. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025

The 2 door reach-in #2 gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. The dish machine was observed broken/non-operational. Establishment is to have dish machine serviced. Equipment must be in good repair. Per PIC, dish machine will be serviced today. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2026
The establishment was lacking proper drain plugs at the time of inspection. Drain plugs were obtained during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. An extra pipe was observed connecting the original pipe to the drain, creating an air break. Per PIC, the extra pipe will be removed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025
Multiple floor tiles in the kitchen area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2026

The door to the outside, located in the storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed torn and in poor repair. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025

Per interview with PIC, mop water gets dumped outside. A service sink or a curbed cleaning facility must be used for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024

Working containers of sauces are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2024
Observed apron to be stored on back ledge of handwash sink. PIC removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerator/freezer shelving to have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2024

Observed the wall behind 3 bay sink area to have black and brown residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2024
